name: Corn Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 1-quart souffle dish or casserole.
3. Melt margarine in a 2-quart saucepan over low heat.
4. Stir in flour, sugar, ground cumin, nutmeg, and red pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth and bubbly.
5. Add milk and bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Boil for 1 minute.
6. Beat egg yolks slightly in a medium bowl.
7. Gradually stir at least half of the hot mixture into the egg yolks.
8. Return hot mixture to saucepan and boil for 1 minute.
9. Remove from heat and stir in onion, chiles, and corn.
10. In another medium bowl, beat egg whites on high speed until stiff.
11. Stir about a quarter of the egg whites into the corn mixture.
12. Fold corn mixture into remaining egg whites.
13. Carefully pour batter into prepared souffle dish.
14. Bake uncovered until a knife inserted in center comes out clean (about 50 minutes).
15. Prepare Green Chile Cheese Sauce and serve with souffle when done.
GREEN CHILE CHEESE SAUCE:
1. Heat all ingredients over low heat, stirring constantly, until cheese is melted.
